ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_dictionaries" (
  "dict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data dictionary */,
  "dict_name" TEXT /* Name of the data dictionary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data dictionary */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data dictionary */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data dictionary was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data dictionary */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data dictionary was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data dictionary */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data dictionary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dictionary_definitions" (
  "definition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each definition */,
  "dict_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data dictionary the definition belongs to */,
  "heading" TEXT /* Heading of the definition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the definition */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., PA, X, PT) */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example value for the definition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the definition */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type this definition belongs to */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group this definition belongs to */,
  "heading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the heading this definition belongs to */,
  "data_steward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data steward responsible for this definition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the definition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the definition was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the definition */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the definition was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dictionary_definitions_dict_id FOREIGN KEY ("dict_id") REFERENCES data_dictionaries ("dict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dictionary_definitions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dictionary_definitions_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dictionary_definitions_heading_id FOREIGN KEY ("heading_id") REFERENCES headings ("heading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "dict_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data dictionary the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "parent_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_dict_id FOREIGN KEY ("dict_id") REFERENCES data_dictionaries ("dict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_parent_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "headings" (
  "heading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heading */,
  "dict_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data dictionary the heading belongs to */,
  "heading_name" TEXT /* Name of the heading */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the heading (e.g., KEY, REQUIRED, OTHER) */,
  "parent_heading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent heading */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the heading */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the heading */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the heading was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the heading */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the heading was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_headings_parent_heading_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_heading_id") REFERENCES headings ("heading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_headings_dict_id FOREIGN KEY ("dict_id") REFERENCES data_dictionaries ("dict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "dict_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data dictionary the data type belongs to */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data type (e.g., 2DP) */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type format */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_types_dict_id FOREIGN KEY ("dict_id") REFERENCES data_dictionaries ("dict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that has this permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
